text.title: Outcome Based Roadmaps Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure for applying Outcome Based Roadmaps. Each step lists input, action, and output. Pause and surface the artefact when output is produced.

step.name: anchor-outcomes
step.action: Pick ≤3 outcomes per quarter aligned to OKRs.

step.name: propose-solutions
step.action: List candidate solutions with confidence + month-range delivery window.

step.name: publish-and-review
step.action: Publish; at quarter-end run review and adjust.

decision-gate.p: After step 4, the artefact MUST satisfy the output contract in content/02-output-contract.xml before downstream consumers read it.
